name: subsetsio

metadata.name: subsetsio
metadata.summary: Official Python SDK for the Subsets API

documentation:
# Subsets SDK

Official Python SDK for the Subsets API.

## Installation

```bash
pip install subsetsio
```

classes.name: subsetsio.models.misc.Color
documentation: Validates hex colors with optional alpha

functions.name: subsetsio.models.update.make_optional
documentation: Makes all fields except 'type' optional and excluded from the model

functions.name: subsetsio.models.base.validate_text
documentation:
Validates text input for chart fields with reasonable Unicode support while maintaining security.

Allows:
- Common Unicode letters and numbers
- Common punctuation and symbols
- Mathematical symbols
- Currency symbols
- Diacritical marks
- Common CJK characters

Blocks:
- Control characters
- Private Use Areas
- Unassigned code points
- Potentially dangerous Unicode categories
